image:image.image:title: Custom craftsman home with deck and pergola in Everett, WA
image:image.image:caption: Aerial drone view of a craftsman home with a custom Sunnyside deck and pergola build in the Puget Sound region.

image:image.image:title: Multi-level ipe hardwood deck with hot tub
image:image.image:caption: Multi-level ipe hardwood deck with integrated hot tub and water view, built by Sunnyside Decks & Fences.

image:image.image:title: Deck framing in progress overlooking the water
image:image.image:caption: Custom deck framing during construction overlooking the Puget Sound — Sunnyside crew on-site.

image:image.image:title: Modern two-level ipe hardwood deck
image:image.image:caption: Modern two-level ipe hardwood deck with cable railing in Snohomish County.

image:image.image:title: Finished ipe deck with stainless cable railing
image:image.image:caption: Finished ipe hardwood deck with stainless cable railing system.

image:image.image:title: Custom deck with polycarbonate pergola roof
image:image.image:caption: Custom deck with polycarbonate-roof pergola for year-round PNW use.

image:image.image:title: Freestanding gable cedar pergola
image:image.image:caption: Freestanding gable-roof cedar pergola in an Everett-area backyard.

image:image.image:title: Tall horizontal slat cedar privacy fence
image:image.image:caption: Tall horizontal slat cedar privacy fence built by Sunnyside Decks & Fences.

image:image.image:title: Horizontal slat cedar driveway gate
image:image.image:caption: Custom horizontal slat cedar driveway gate installation.

image:image.image:title: Two-story residential deck and balcony
image:image.image:caption: Two-story residential deck and balcony build in the greater Seattle area.

image:image.image:title: Covered patio with stone columns
image:image.image:caption: Covered patio with stone columns and timber roof, designed for PNW rain.

image:image.image:title: Composite deck with cable railing
image:image.image:caption: Composite deck installation with stainless cable railing in Snohomish County.

image:image.image:title: Custom cedar double gate
image:image.image:caption: Custom cedar double gate matched to a horizontal slat fence.

image:image.image:title: Aerial view of craftsman home deck and stairs
image:image.image:caption: Aerial view of a craftsman home with a custom Sunnyside deck and stair build.

image:image.image:title: Aerial close-up of craftsman home with pergola and skylights
image:image.image:caption: Custom craftsman home with Sunnyside Decks & Fences pergola and skylight build.

image:image.image:title: Tim Lapatsin's crew building a covered patio
image:image.image:caption: Tim Lapatsin and the Sunnyside crew building a covered patio in the Puget Sound area.

image:image.image:title: Freestanding cedar pergola on flagstone patio
image:image.image:caption: Freestanding cedar pergola on a flagstone patio with custom landscaping.

image:image.image:title: Attached covered patio with stone columns
image:image.image:caption: Attached covered patio with stone columns and lush green lawn — built by Sunnyside Decks & Fences.

image:image.image:title: Horizontal slat cedar fence along a sidewalk
image:image.image:caption: Custom horizontal slat cedar fence installed along a sidewalk in a modern Puget Sound neighborhood.
